defect: tracked machine-specific absolute path (E:/BackUp/Git_EE company checkout) plus failure-swallowing dev-null-or-true wrappers; wrong on every clone except the company machine
design_intent: manage_agent_closeout install --agent copilot generates this file per machine with that machine framework root (Tier A native hook per tool docstring), so the file is meant to be local, not tracked
f7_scope_note: F7_GOVERNANCE_ALLOWLIST names this file for dirty-scope classification only; no F-7 code writes or copies it, so removal does not change F-7 behavior
regeneration: python -m governance_tools.manage_agent_closeout install --agent copilot (run on the machine that needs the hook, e.g. the company machine after next pull)
residual_risk: the company machine loses its Copilot sessionEnd hook after next pull until the one-line installer is re-run there; owner accepted by choosing removal
owner_authorization: 2026-07-12: remove + gitignore chosen via decision prompt
